source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS AddressCount
FROM SalesLT.Address

defaultValue.Query: SELECT * FROM SalesLT.Customer WHERE CustomerID > 100 AND CustomerID < 1000

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CustomerCount
FROM SalesLT.Customer

SELECT LastModifiedDate
FROM SalesLT.WatermarkTable
WHERE TableName='Customer'

SELECT MAX(ModifiedDate) AS LatestDate
FROM SalesLT.Customer

SELECT
    C.CustomerID,
    C.FirstName,
    C.LastName,
    A.AddressLine1,
    A.AddressLine2,
    A.City,
    A.StateProvince,
    A.PostalCode,
    A.CountryRegion
FROM SalesLT.Customer C
INNER JOIN SalesLT.CustomerAddress CA
    ON C.CustomerID = CA.CustomerID
INNER JOIN SalesLT.Address A
    ON CA.AddressID = A.AddressID;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS TotalRecords
FROM SalesLT.Product;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CustomerCount
FROM SalesLT.Customer
